info.title: GARVIS Operator API
info.description:
**Governance-Aware Reflective Virtual Intelligence System** - Operator Console API.

Provides RESTful endpoints and WebSocket for real-time observation of the GARVIS cognition runtime. All endpoints are strictly observational - they expose data for operator viewing, never execute autonomous cognition.

## Governance Context
Every response includes governance context headers.
- `X-Governance-Scope`: The governance scope of the endpoint
- `X-API-Version`: API version identifier

get.description: List all governance schemas (paginated, optionally filtered by category).
Get a specific governance schema by ID with full details.

schema.title: Response Get Schema Api V1 Governance Schemas  Schema Id  Get

get.description: List all currently active governance schemas.
List all schema categories with counts.
List all constraints across all active schemas.

schema.title: Response List Constraints Api V1 Governance Constraints List Get

get.description: Get constraints filtered by scope (global, session, inference, memory).

schema.title: Response Get Constraints By Scope Api V1 Governance Constraints  Scope  Get

get.description: List recorded governance violations (paginated, filterable).

Get the enforcement chain for a given scope.

Constraints are ordered by enforcement severity: hard_stop first,
then degrade, then log_only.

post.description:
Explicitly activate a governance schema.

Requires operator authorization. Logs the action for audit.

schema.title: Response Activate Schema Api V1 Governance Schemas  Schema Id  Activate Post

post.description:
Explicitly deactivate a governance schema.

Requires operator authorization. Logs the action and warns about
reduced governance coverage.

schema.title: Response Deactivate Schema Api V1 Governance Schemas  Schema Id  Deactivate Post

get.description: Get the current operational state with metadata.
List all possible operational states.
List recent state transitions (paginated, newest first).
Get all valid transitions from the current state.
Get all forbidden state patterns that trigger auto fail-closed.

post.description:
Request a state transition with explicit trigger reason.

The transition is validated against the governance transition graph
and governance checks. Returns success/failure.

get.description: List active and closed sessions (paginated).
Get detailed information about a specific session.

schema.title: Response Get Session Api V1 Cognition Sessions  Session Id  Get

get.description: Get state transitions for a specific session.
List episodic memories (paginated, filterable).
Get a specific memory by ID with full details.

schema.title: Response Get Memory Api V1 Memory Memories  Memory Id  Get

get.description: Get all memories for a specific session.
Search memories by content query string.
Get all influences originating from a specific memory.
List all memory influences (paginated, filterable by type).

Get memory influences for a specific session.

This looks up memories for the session, then finds all influences
from those memories.
List cognition traces (paginated, filterable).
Get a specific trace by ID with full details.

schema.title: Response Get Trace Api V1 Traceability Traces  Trace Id  Get

get.description:
Get the lineage graph for a trace.

Returns a graph structure with nodes (transitions, events, checks,
influences, memories) and edges (relationships).

Render a trace in the requested format.

Supported formats:
- **text**: ANSI-colored structured text
- **dot**: Graphviz DOT format
- **mermaid**: Mermaid flowchart for Markdown
- **json**: Pretty-printed JSON

schema.title: Response Render Trace Api V1 Traceability Traces  Trace Id  Render Get

get.description: Get all traces for a specific session.

List audit events (paginated, filterable).

Filter by event_type, severity, component, or session_id.
Get a summary of audit events grouped by type and severity.

Server-Sent Events (SSE) stream of audit events.

Streams real-time audit events as they occur.  In mock mode,
generates synthetic events at regular intervals.
List governance violation records (paginated, filterable).
Get a summary of violations grouped by severity and schema.
List governance check results (paginated, filterable).
Get governance check results for a specific trace.
High-level analytics overview of the GARVIS runtime.
Governance pressure metrics — how heavily governance is constraining inference.
Alignment persistence trends across sessions.
Rate at which the system discloses uncertainty in responses.
Session continuity and stability metrics.
Degradation and recovery trend metrics.
Resilience analytics — ability to recover from failures.
Reasoning quality trend metrics.

Full cognition ecosystem graph data.

Returns nodes and edges representing the relationships between
schemas, policies, constraints, memories, inferences, and audit events.
Runtime status overview.

Health check for all runtime components.

Returns healthy/degraded/unhealthy status for:
- PostgreSQL database
- Ollama LLM service
- Governance registry
- Audit pipeline
- Memory store
- State machine
List all component statuses.
Key runtime metrics.

Get complete Mission Control overview.

Returns unified view of all projects, governance status,
cognition state, workflows, alerts, topology, ecosystem, and health.

schema.title: Response Get Full Overview Api V1 Command Center Overview Get

get.description:
Get command view for a specific project.

Includes: status, workflows, governance, memory, analytics.

schema.title: Response Get Project Command View Api V1 Command Center Projects  Project Id  Command Get

get.description:
Get cognition command view.

Current state, active sessions, governance context.

schema.title: Response Get Cognition Command View Api V1 Command Center Cognition Command Get

get.description:
Get governance command view.

Active schemas, violations, pressure, enforcement.

schema.title: Response Get Governance Command View Api V1 Command Center Governance Command Get

get.description:
Get real-time operational cognition map.

Active workflows, memory operations, governance checks.

schema.title: Response Get Operational Cognition Map Api V1 Command Center Operational Map Get

get.description:
Get ecosystem-wide traceability.

Traces flowing through all layers and projects.

schema.title: Response Get Ecosystem Traceability Api V1 Command Center Ecosystem Traceability Get

get.description:
Get cognition ecosystem topology.

Nodes and edges showing relationships.

schema.title: Response Get Cognition Topology Api V1 Command Center Ecosystem Topology Get

get.description:
Get governance ecosystem.

Schema interactions, enforcement patterns, cross-project inheritance.

schema.title: Response Get Governance Ecosystem Api V1 Command Center Ecosystem Governance Get

get.description:
Get cognition ecosystem.

Component dependencies and influence flows.

schema.title: Response Get Cognition Ecosystem Api V1 Command Center Ecosystem Cognition Get

get.description:
Get resilience ecosystem.

Degradation patterns and recovery flows.

schema.title: Response Get Resilience Ecosystem Api V1 Command Center Ecosystem Resilience Get

get.description:
Get continuity ecosystem.

Session continuity and alignment persistence.

schema.title: Response Get Continuity Ecosystem Api V1 Command Center Ecosystem Continuity Get

get.description:
Get complete ecosystem view.

All sub-ecosystems combined with project context.

schema.title: Response Get Full Ecosystem Api V1 Command Center Ecosystem Full Get

get.description:
Get reflective operational analytics.

Governance durability, alignment survivability, workflow integrity.

schema.title: Response Get Operational Analytics Api V1 Command Center Analytics Operational Get

post.description:
Execute an operator command.

Valid commands:
- switch_project: Switch active project context
- activate_schema: Activate a governance schema
- deactivate_schema: Deactivate a governance schema
- acknowledge_alert: Acknowledge an alert
- approve_workflow: Approve a workflow proposal
- run_health_check: Run full health check
- generate_report: Generate operational report

ALL commands are audited. operator_id is required.

schema.title: Response Execute Command Api V1 Command Center Command Execute Post

post.description:
Start a new collaboration session.

Creates a governed collaboration session between an operator and GARVIS.
All subsequent interactions are mediated by governance and fully audited.

schema.title: Response Start Collaboration Session Api V1 Collaboration Sessions Post

post.description:
Submit operator input to collaboration session.

Processes the input through full governance validation and returns
a governed response with complete reasoning visibility.

parameters.name: input_type

schema.description: Input type: query, propose_action, request_analysis, governance_review, status_check, explain_decision
schema.title: Input Type

parameters.description: Input type: query, propose_action, request_analysis, governance_review, status_check, explain_decision

schema.title: Response Submit Input Api V1 Collaboration Sessions  Session Id  Input Post

get.description:
Get collaboration session status and history.

Returns full session state including interaction history
with governance context for every interaction.

schema.title: Response Get Session Api V1 Collaboration Sessions  Session Id  Get

get.description:
Get governance summary for session.

Returns detailed governance check statistics, violation counts,
and uncertainty disclosure rate for the session.

schema.title: Response Get Session Governance Api V1 Collaboration Sessions  Session Id  Governance Get

post.description:
End a collaboration session.

Terminates the session and returns a full summary with audit trail.

schema.title: Response End Collaboration Session Api V1 Collaboration Sessions  Session Id  End Post

get.description:
Explain why an action was blocked.

Returns comprehensive explanation of the governance decision
with escalation path and uncertainty disclosure.

schema.title: Response Explain Block Api V1 Collaboration Negotiation Explain Block Get

get.description:
Explain how governance modified content.

Shows what changed and why, with full governance context.

schema.title: Response Explain Modification Api V1 Collaboration Negotiation Explain Modification Get

get.description:
Explain uncertainty in a given context.

Provides structured uncertainty disclosure with sources
and confidence basis.

schema.title: Response Explain Uncertainty Api V1 Collaboration Negotiation Uncertainty Get

get.description:
Get full negotiation view for a session.

Shows all governance decisions with explanations for a
collaboration session.

schema.title: Response Get Negotiation View Api V1 Collaboration Negotiation View  Session Id  Get

get.description:
Get step-by-step approval path for a blocked action.

Returns the governance requirements and steps needed
to potentially approve a blocked action.

schema.title: Response Get Approval Path Api V1 Collaboration Negotiation Approval Path Get

get.description:
Get strategic trajectory analysis.

Returns governance-safe recommendations for project direction
with full reasoning visibility.

schema.title: Response Get Project Trajectory Api V1 Collaboration Strategy Trajectory  Project Id  Get

get.description:
Get operational needs forecast.

Returns bounded operational forecasting within governance constraints.

schema.title: Response Get Operational Forecast Api V1 Collaboration Strategy Forecast  Project Id  Get

get.description:
Get operational readiness assessment.

Returns governance-bounded readiness evaluation with
specific criteria and recommendations.

schema.title: Response Get Operational Readiness Api V1 Collaboration Strategy Readiness  Project Id  Get

get.description:
Get governance adjustment recommendations.

Returns recommendations that ALL require operator approval.
The system NEVER auto-adjusts governance.

schema.title: Response Get Governance Recommendations Api V1 Collaboration Strategy Governance Recommendations  Project Id  Get

get.description:
Generate a bounded cognitive strategy.

Returns a governance-safe strategy with uncertainty disclosures
and full reasoning trace.

schema.title: Response Get Cognitive Strategy Api V1 Collaboration Strategy Cognitive Strategy Get
Response Runtime Command Api V1 Runtime Command Post
Response Runtime Status Api V1 Runtime Status Get
Response Get Command Result Api V1 Runtime Commands  Command Id  Get
Response Voice Text Test Api V1 Voice Text Test Post

get.description: API root — returns basic info and available endpoints.

AuditEvent.title: AuditEvent
AuditEvent.description: A single auditable event in the runtime.

AuditEventSummaryResponse.title: AuditEventSummaryResponse
AuditEventSummaryResponse.description: Summary of audit events by type and severity.

ChecksListResponse.title: ChecksListResponse
ChecksListResponse.description: Paginated list of governance check results.

session_id.title: Session Id
session_id.description: Identifier of the session this memory belongs to

episode_type.title: Episode Type
episode_type.description: Type of cognitive episode: inference, reflection, retrieval, or audit

content.title: Content
content.description: The textual content of the memory episode

provenance.description: Full provenance record for this memory

governance_influences.title: Governance Influences
governance_influences.description: List of governance schema identifiers that influenced the creation of this memory

confidence.title: Confidence
confidence.description: Confidence score in the range [0.0, 1.0], governed by the uncertainty_management schema

timestamp.title: Timestamp
timestamp.description: UTC timestamp when the memory was created

retrieval_count.title: Retrieval Count
retrieval_count.description: Number of times this memory has been retrieved. Incremented on each retrieval.

last_accessed.title: Last Accessed
last_accessed.description: UTC timestamp of the most recent retrieval. None if the memory has never been accessed.

EpisodicMemory.title: EpisodicMemory
EpisodicMemory.description:
A stored cognitive episode with full provenance.

Episodic memories are the primary unit of memory in GARVIS. Each memory
records a cognitive episode -- an inference, reflection, retrieval, or audit
event -- with complete provenance and governance context.

ForbiddenStatePattern.title: ForbiddenStatePattern
ForbiddenStatePattern.description: A pattern of states that must never occur.

GovernanceCheckResult.title: GovernanceCheckResult
GovernanceCheckResult.description: Result of a governance validation check.

GovernanceConstraint.title: GovernanceConstraint
GovernanceConstraint.description: A hard constraint that must always hold.

GovernanceViolation.title: GovernanceViolation
GovernanceViolation.description: Recorded when a policy or constraint is breached.

influence_id.title: Influence Id
influence_id.description: Unique identifier for this influence record

memory_id.title: Memory Id
memory_id.description: Identifier of the memory that influenced reasoning

target_inference_id.title: Target Inference Id
target_inference_id.description: Identifier of the inference request that was influenced

influence_type.title: Influence Type
influence_type.description: Type of influence: retrieval, context, constraint, or warning

strength.title: Strength
strength.description: Strength of the influence in the range [0.0, 1.0]. Higher values indicate stronger influence on the reasoning.

trace_visible.title: Trace Visible
trace_visible.description: Whether this influence is visible in the cognition trace. Always True in GARVIS -- no hidden memory influence.

timestamp.title: Timestamp
timestamp.description: UTC timestamp when the influence was recorded

MemoryInfluence.title: MemoryInfluence
MemoryInfluence.description:
Tracks how a memory influenced reasoning.

Memory influences are recorded whenever a retrieved memory affects an
inference. This provides the traceability link between memory and
reasoning -- every memory that contributed to a response is visible.

OperationalState.title: OperationalState
OperationalState.description: Governed operational states of the cognition runtime.

source_schema.title: Source Schema
source_schema.description: Identifier of the governance schema that governed the creation of this artifact

source_policy.title: Source Policy
source_policy.description: Identifier of the specific policy within the source schema. None if not governed by a specific policy.

inference_id.title: Inference Id
inference_id.description: Identifier of the inference request that produced this artifact. None if not produced by inference.

creator_component.title: Creator Component
creator_component.description: Name of the runtime component that created this artifact, e.g. 'EpisodicMemoryStore', 'GovernedInferenceExecutor'

creation_timestamp.title: Creation Timestamp
creation_timestamp.description: UTC timestamp when the artifact was created

parent_memory_id.title: Parent Memory Id
parent_memory_id.description: Identifier of the parent memory if this artifact was derived from another memory. None for original memories.

ProvenanceRecord.title: ProvenanceRecord
ProvenanceRecord.description:
Full provenance tracking for traceability.

Every artifact in GARVIS -- memories, inferences, decisions -- carries a
provenance record that establishes its origin, governance context, and
lineage. This enables complete post-hoc traceability.

SchemaSummary.title: SchemaSummary
SchemaSummary.description: Lightweight schema info for list views.

TransitionResult.title: TransitionResult
TransitionResult.description: Result of a requested state transition.

ValidTransitionsResponse.title: ValidTransitionsResponse
ValidTransitionsResponse.description: Valid transitions from the current state.

note.title: Note
note.default: Voice pipeline is skeleton. Only text simulation is active.
